global.description: The ad features a travel service promotion with a clear call to action and pricing.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for travel bookings.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: A prominent logo at the top center featuring the word 'DriftPass' in bold, modern typography.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large, bold headline stating 'Book your next trip' positioned centrally, conveying a travel theme.

elements.label: Top decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape at the top left, possibly a circle, adding visual interest without specific detail.

elements.label: Top right shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape at the top right, providing a contrasting visual element to the ad.

elements.label: Bottom left shape
elements.description: A small rectangular shape at the bottom left, possibly a decorative element or icon.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Text below the headline that reads 'Special fares today', in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Special fares today

elements.label: DriftPass title
elements.description: The word 'DriftPass' displayed prominently at the top, indicating the brand or service being advertised.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A price label at the bottom center showing '€29.99' in a bold font, drawing attention to the cost.
